name: web_research
description: Capability manifest for web research goals. Provides the web_search tool powered by the Tavily API via the ToolServer webhook.

tools.name: web_search
tools.description: Search the web using the Tavily Search API and return a ranked list of relevant results with titles, URLs, and content snippets. Use this to gather up-to-date information on any topic.

query.description: The search query string. Be specific and include relevant keywords for best results.

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return. Defaults to 5. Maximum allowed is 20.

search_depth.description: Search depth. Use 'basic' for fast broad results or 'advanced' for deeper research. Defaults to 'basic'.

include_domains.description: Optional list of domains to restrict results to (e.g. ['arxiv.org', 'github.com']).

exclude_domains.description: Optional list of domains to exclude from results.
